name: @platform/react-enterprise-app
description: Generic React 19 TypeScript enterprise application shell using generated GraphQL contracts through approved adapters.

readme.summary: Generic React 19 TypeScript enterprise application shell using generated GraphQL contracts through approved adapters.
responsibilities: Own the browser application shell, routing surface, runtime bootstrapping, and application-level composition
Compose feature packages through public exports
Consume data operations only through approved contract and adapter package boundaries
Compose role-aware application surfaces for admin, staff, and user experiences
nonResponsibilities: Does not own product-specific domain policy
Does not define GraphQL schema or operation ownership
Does not bypass package public exports or call vendor transport directly
Does not own role policy definitions or permission evaluation
usage: Use as the generic enterprise React application entry package
Import feature packages through their public exports
Use generated GraphQL TypedDocumentNode operations through approved adapter packages
operationalNotes: Representative stack: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, GraphQL Code Generator, and TanStack Query or Apollo Client
No business-domain end state is assumed by this package
